reportedFindings.summary: DOH (Doha) status should be ALL OPERATIONS SUSPENDED, not SEVERELY DISRUPTED
Emirates suspended all operations until March 2 15:00 UAE time
reportedFindings.resolutionNote: Emirates Travel Updates now states suspension extended to Mar 3 15:00 UAE time.

reportedFindings.summary: Emirates extended suspension until March 3 15:00 UAE time
Etihad suspended until March 2 02:00 UAE time
FlyDubai suspended until March 2 15:00 UAE time
Air Arabia suspended until March 2 15:00 UAE time
IndiGo suspended until March 2 2359 IST
Air India Express suspended to Gulf until March 2 2359 IST
Air India also cancelled Europe/US flights (London, Birmingham, Amsterdam, Zurich, Milan, Vienna, Copenhagen, Frankfurt)
1 death, 11 injuries at DXB/AUH airports; UAE intercepted 137 missiles + 209 drones
Kerala NORKA helpdesk set up for Gulf expatriates
Doha Embassy in emergency-only mode, regular consular services closed
MEA advisory: foreign nationals in India contact FRRO for visa extensions
Strait of Hormuz reportedly closed by Iran
India assessing evacuation readiness but none initiated; ~10M Indians in Gulf
Over 1,500 flights cancelled March 1 across GCC (~40% of scheduled)
Standard travel insurance excludes acts of war; war-risk premiums ~$8/trip
CBSE Class 10/12 exams postponed for March 2 in 7 Gulf countries; review on March 3
DGCA advisory to avoid 11 FIRs valid until March 2
Akasa Air suspended Abu Dhabi, Doha, Jeddah, Kuwait, Riyadh until March 2
Qatar Airways operations suspended due to Qatari airspace closure
Etihad suspension extended from 02:00 to 14:00 (2 PM) UAE time March 2. Rebooking free until March 15 for bookings before Feb 28.
UAE schools collectively writing to CISCE (ICSE/ISC board) to request rescheduling of upcoming papers
UAE Ministry of Education directed all schools to shift to distance learning March 2-4. School transport and activities suspended.
Iran NOTAM: airspace closed through at least March 3. Extends beyond DGCA advisory (valid until March 2).
Kuwait International Airport (KWI) took a direct hit from an Iranian drone, causing damage inside the terminal building.
Qatar Airways updated operations notice (dated Mar 2) and says next update will be issued March 3 by 09:00 Doha time (06:00 UTC).
Dubai Airports: DXB and DWC operations suspended until further notice
Emirates to operate limited number of flights from evening Mar 2; all other flights suspended until further notice; rebook for travel on/before Mar 20 or refund.
Dubai Airports says limited operations expected to resume later Mar 2 with small number of flights from DXB and DWC.
Etihad flight status notice says all scheduled commercial flights to/from Abu Dhabi are suspended until 14:00 UAE time Wed, 4 Mar; rebooking waivers and refunds available for eligible tickets.
CBSE Circular-2 (reported by NDTV) postpones Mar 5-6 exams in 7 Middle East countries; review on Mar 5 for exams from Mar 7 onwards. Official CBSE PDF not located yet.
Air India extended temporary suspension of all flights to/from Middle East region until 23:59 IST on Mar 3, 2026.
